raw_result.description: API service for retrieving YouTube transcripts, search results, metadata, and channel/playlist content via REST and MCP.
raw_result.auth_notes: The REST API docs show Bearer authentication using an API token in the Authorization header (`Authorization: Bearer sk_your_api_key`), mapped to `token`. The MCP docs additionally document OAuth 2.1 support and API key authentication for MCP clients.
raw_result.gating_reason: Public pricing lists a free tier with 100 free credits and no card required, alongside self-serve paid monthly and annual plans.

api_surface.breadth: Public REST API docs cover YouTube transcript extraction, video info, search, channel lookup/listing, latest channel videos, and playlist video listing; the site also publishes MCP server docs for agent tooling.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official MCP docs describe a hosted MCP server at `https://transcriptapi.com/mcp`, six tools, and support for OAuth 2.1 and API-key auth in MCP clients.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: API docs state 200 RPM on monthly plans and 300 RPM on annual plans, with X-RateLimit headers returned in responses.
raw_result.notable_signals: The homepage claims 15M+ transcripts served monthly; docs include explicit endpoint credit costs, MCP tooling, and integrations for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and VS Code.

result.description: API service for retrieving YouTube transcripts, search results, metadata, and channel/playlist content via REST and MCP.
result.auth_notes: The REST API docs show Bearer authentication using an API token in the Authorization header (`Authorization: Bearer sk_your_api_key`), mapped to `token`. The MCP docs additionally document OAuth 2.1 support and API key authentication for MCP clients.
result.gating_reason: Public pricing lists a free tier with 100 free credits and no card required, alongside self-serve paid monthly and annual plans.

api_surface.breadth: Public REST API docs cover YouTube transcript extraction, video info, search, channel lookup/listing, latest channel videos, and playlist video listing; the site also publishes MCP server docs for agent tooling.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official MCP docs describe a hosted MCP server at `https://transcriptapi.com/mcp`, six tools, and support for OAuth 2.1 and API-key auth in MCP clients.

result.rate_limit_notes: API docs state 200 RPM on monthly plans and 300 RPM on annual plans, with X-RateLimit headers returned in responses.
result.notable_signals: The homepage claims 15M+ transcripts served monthly; docs include explicit endpoint credit costs, MCP tooling, and integrations for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and VS Code.
